speaker: BASTARD
text: Now, by my life, this day grows wondrous hot.

speaker: BASTARD
text: Some airy devil hovers in the sky

speaker: BASTARD
text: And pours down mischief. Austria’s head lie there,

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Hubert, keep this boy.—Philip, make up.

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: My mother is assailèd in our tent

speaker: BASTARD
text: Her Highness is in safety, fear you not.

speaker: BASTARD
text: But on, my liege, for very little pains

speaker: BASTARD
text: Will bring this labor to an happy end.
